items.title_en: Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation
items.title_zh: Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation
items.summary_en: The Trump administration issued a new AI policy framework aimed at preempting state-level AI regulations, raising concerns among consumer advocates. (The Verge)
items.summary_zh: The Trump administration issued a new AI policy framework aimed at preempting state-level AI regulations, raising concerns among consumer advocates.（The Verge）

items.title_en: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
items.title_zh: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
items.summary_en: Google is experimenting with AI-generated summaries that replace news article headlines in Search results, testing the feature on a subset of users. (The Verge)
items.summary_zh: Google is experimenting with AI-generated summaries that replace news article headlines in Search results, testing the feature on a subset of users.（The Verge）

items.title_en: Amazon is making an Alexa phone
items.title_zh: Amazon is making an Alexa phone
items.summary_en: Amazon is developing a smartphone codenamed Transformer that would run Alexa as its primary AI interface, competing with Google and Apple AI phones. (The Verge)
items.summary_zh: Amazon is developing a smartphone codenamed Transformer that would run Alexa as its primary AI interface, competing with Google and Apple AI phones.（The Verge）

items.title_zh: AI屠刀下一站“Vibe设计”！谷歌一个产品把合作伙伴Figma干崩了
items.summary_zh: ：软件行业又遭一记重创（量子位）
